meta.title: nyxCore — Cognitive Vault
meta.description: The AI-powered knowledge vault that learns how your team thinks.

hero.jp: ナレッジ・ヴォールト
hero.subtitle: The AI-powered knowledge vault that learns how your team thinks — built for developers who hate documentation but love shipping.

problem.label: Problem
problem.title: Traditional knowledge bases
fails: They assume people will write docs (they won't)
They optimize for search, not learning
They treat knowledge as static snapshots, not living conversations
They ignore the tribal knowledge that actually runs your systems
problem.inversionText: Instead of forcing developers to document, we <bold>extract knowledge directly from your codebase</bold> — architecture, imports, symbols, complexity, churn. Point CKB at your repo, ask questions in plain English, and get answers grounded in real code context. The AI plans the queries. You just ask.

panels.subtitle: Onboarding — Down from 3 months
features: Interactive architecture graphs — explore modules, dependencies & call chains with React Flow
AI-guided onboarding plans — structured paths through your codebase
Ask anything in natural language — "How does auth work?" answered with real code context
Guided walkthroughs — AI explains not just what the code does, but why it exists

panels.subtitle: Codebase Knowledge Base — Semantic analysis
features: Architecture analysis — treemaps, heatmaps & dependency graphs with metrics
Hotspot detection — churn, complexity & coupling scores per file
Symbol search & call graph tracing across your entire codebase
Cycle detection & semantic boundary inference via Tarjan’s algorithm

panels.subtitle: Pluggable AI — Choose your model
features: Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic — bring your own API key
Ollama support — run fully local, zero data leaves your machine
AI plans CKB queries automatically — no prompt engineering needed
Real-time WebSocket streaming — instant, token-by-token responses

panels.subtitle: Code Intelligence — See your system
features: Graph visualization — architecture, callgraph & file tree views with drill-down
Color modes — complexity, churn, LOC & type-based node coloring
Built-in IDE view — browse files with syntax highlighting
i18n ready — German & English out of the box, extensible

quotes.text: We reduced new developer ramp-up time by 87%. Juniors are pushing to production in their first week.
Our senior devs finally stopped answering the same questions 47 times a day. They’re actually building now.

demo.label: Demo
demo.title: See it in action.
demo.tryLive: Try it Live — No Signup Required

downloads.label: Downloads
downloads.title: Download for
downloads.dockerDesc: Run fully local with Docker Compose

free.name: Open Source
free.description: For individual developers and small projects

nyxCore.label: nyxCore
nyxCore.title: Powered by
nyxCore.subtitle: The intelligent backbone that turns raw knowledge into actionable systems — from compliance to training, all in one platform.

features.title: Wisdom
features.description: Consolidates cross-project patterns into reusable prompt hints — your team's collective intelligence, distilled and queryable.

features.title: Workflows
features.description: Dynamic multi-step AI pipelines with fan-out, review checkpoints, and BYOK providers — from code review to architecture analysis.

features.title: Documentation
features.description: Axiom RAG ingests your docs, READMEs, and code context into a hybrid search engine — always in sync, always findable.

features.title: Compliance Analyses
features.description: Authority-leveled RAG rules — mandatory (GDPR, ISO, legal), guidelines, and context docs enforced directly in your workflows.

features.title: Training
features.description: AI-guided onboarding paths generated from your real codebase — interactive walkthroughs, architecture graphs, and natural language Q&A.

features.title: Security Checks
features.description: Automated vulnerability scanning, encrypted API key vault (AES-256-GCM), RLS-enforced multi-tenancy, and audit logging built in.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to stop losing
ctaFinal.subtitle: Join teams shipping faster with AI-powered codebase understanding.
